CustomField.description: Count of Form_Finding__c child records on this Linked_Form whose Status__c is Open or In Progress. Recalculated by FormAnswerScoringTrigger / NeuraFormScoringRollupQueueable each time an answer changes — denormalized rather than roll-up summary so the trigger can update it in the same DML pass as Score__c.
CustomField.label: Findings Open Count
